'''Nute Gunray's citadel''', also referred to as '''Nute Gunray's redoubt''', was a large fortress located on the western hemisphere of [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]]. It was used as a stronghold and storehouse by [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]], [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Viceroy]] of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].

==Description==
The tiered citadel rose from high ground at the end of a peninsula, surrounded on three sides by a lake fed by an irrigation canal. The structure of the citadel was reminiscent of the command towers of [[Core ship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class Core Ships]], themselves modeled on [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] hive structures.

The lower ramparts of the citadel opened out onto an orchard of [[Manax tree/Legends|manax trees]], and were defended by [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] cannons. A [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]] protected the entire structure, and was powerful enough to stave off even orbital attacks.

==History==
During the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]], Gunray returned to his fortress following the targeting of his [[Neimoidia/Legends|homeworld]] and the fall of [[Purse world/Legends|purse worlds]] [[Deko Neimoidia/Legends|Deko]] and [[Koru Neimoidia/Legends|Koru Neimoidia]]. Escorted by a battle fleet of Federation [[Warship/Legends|warships]], Gunray attempted to flee with as many of his possessions as he was able to loot from the citadel. However, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] anticipated this move, and launched a strike against the planet.

Republic forces, led by [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], laid siege to the citadel, hoping to trap Gunray inside. Although the citadel was breached, the [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] made his escape in ''[[Lapiz Cutter/Legends|Lapiz Cutter]]'', rendezvousing with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] in orbit. However, he neglected to take with him a prized [[Mechno-chair/Legends|mechno-chair]], which was later found by Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi, the capture of which ultimately led to a hunt for [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]], prior to the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]].

Gunray's citadel was captured by the Republic forces during the [[Battle of Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Battle of Cato Neimoidia]], when [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[X2]] infiltrated the fortress with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ferroda]] and shut down the droid army.
